paragraphs: Backend developer working with Java and Spring Boot. I've built across the stack — CI/CD pipelines, observability, security, cloud infra — the kind of work that keeps engineering teams productive.
I care about what actually holds up in production, not what's trending. The tradeoffs, the constraints, the decisions you have to live with long after the PR is merged.
I want to give back to the developer community — write about what I've learned, open-source tools, put out the kind of resources that would've helped me when I was starting out.
When I'm not in a terminal, I'm watching art films or burning through anime.
